name: WWE
description:
Requested

—-—————->

Basically a choose your own adventure bot (per request)

I love WWE 😭 I added as many people as I wanted, though some people stayed out because I know I’d be throwing hands when using the bot

—-—————->

I have the feeling I’m about to be cremated from someone from somewhere, we’ll see. Oh and if it doesn’t use a wrestler and does like “WWE looks your way” just use specific wrestlers names and keep reloading texts until the people you want shows up 😭 had this happen earlier
creator: Flamesheart
